name: Tw93
identity: Father of Kaku | Waza | Kami | Mole | Pake | MiaoYan
bio: Building simple, useful tools for everyday life.

values.beliefs: Believes in AI, invests in AI, believes in long-termism
values.stance: Dislikes tech celebrity culture and hype
values.philosophy: Tools should be small, fast, and solve one problem well

projects.name: Pake
projects.tagline: Turn any webpage into a lightweight desktop app with Rust + Tauri. Nearly 20x smaller than Electron.

projects.name: Kaku
projects.tagline: GPU-accelerated terminal emulator for macOS, built with Rust and Lua.

projects.name: MiaoYan
projects.tagline: Lightweight macOS Markdown editor in Swift. Local-first, supports LaTeX and Mermaid.

projects.name: Mole
projects.tagline: All-in-one macOS system cleaning and maintenance AI assistant.

projects.name: Waza
projects.tagline: Reusable Claude Code skill pack for engineering workflows.

projects.name: Kami
projects.tagline: Document design system for AI-generated PDFs with warm parchment typography.

projects.name: Weekly
projects.tagline: 潮流周刊 source repo, 266+ issues of curated tech and lifestyle discoveries.

projects.name: Maple
projects.tagline: Chrome extension that transforms the bookmark bar into a beautiful new tab page.

projects.name: tw93 Profile
projects.tagline: Auto-updating GitHub profile README with dynamic stats and project highlights.

projects.name: tw93 Blog
projects.tagline: Personal blog source code, covering product engineering, AI coding, and design.

projects.name: cz-emoji-chinese
projects.tagline: Commitizen adapter for Chinese emoji-style git commit messages.

projects.tagline: RSS reader theme that matches MiaoYan's aesthetic for NetNewsWire.
